response.justification: The candidate's career of 15+ years is almost entirely built on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile technologies. C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project — nowhere near the 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development the role mandates. There is no traceable fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience; RIDE Capital appears to be a German retail-investment fintech, not an investment bank or capital-markets firm. SQL skills are listed generically with MySQL, but SQL Server and Oracle — the required platforms — are absent from both the skills section and any job description.
strengths: CI/CD pipeline experience across multiple roles, including GitLab, Docker, and trunk-based development
Java development background satisfies one of the optional desirable skills
Demonstrated ability to work in high-throughput, low-latency systems (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of requests/second)
concerns: C++ experience is marginal (~6 months at NI + a thesis project) versus the 5–10 year mandatory requirement
No fixed-income, derivatives, investment-banking, or capital-markets domain knowledge anywhere in the resume
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; Windows platform is not referenced in any role
